title: Cif Pink Tuberose Cream Cleaner, 500 ml, (Pack of 8)
features: Cif Pink Tuberose Cream Cleaner is the UK’s No.1* multipurpose surface cream cleaner enriched with a floral fragrance
This surface cleaner is packed with 100% natural cleaning particles to provide gentle and reliable cleaning
Cif Pink Tuberose Cream Cleaner removes encrusted grease, burnt-on food and bathroom limescale stains, for damage-free, clean surfaces**
This multipurpose cleaner removes 100% of the toughest dirt from surfaces with zero fuss thanks to its powerful texture that requires less rinsing
To take better care of our planet, our multipurpose cleaning cream's bottle is made with recycled plastic*** and is 100% recyclable, all you have to do is remove the sleeve
With a fresh floral scent, this multipurpose cream cleaner will leave your surfaces 100% beautifully clean and looking their very best
description: Product Description Cif Pink Tuberose Cream Cleaner delivers 100% tough dirt removal and 100% beautifully clean, streak-free surfaces while leaving your home with a fresh, floral scent. Thanks to its texture, it requires less rinsing, so you'll only need a tiny squirt to completely remove all kinds of dirt, even those that seem impossible to clean. Removing encrusted grease, burnt-on food, and bathroom limescale stains has never been this easy. The UK’s No.1 cream cleaner* is made with 100% natural cleaning particles, and its bottle is made with recycled plastic*** and is 100% recyclable – just remember to remove the sleeve. This multipurpose surface cleaner leaves surfaces clean and damage-free** and can be used to clean hobs, sinks, baths and tiles in your kitchen and bathroom. Apply to surface using a damp cloth, then simply wipe over and gently rinse away. Read instructions on the label before applying. At Cif, we believe in revealing and protecting beauty for everyone to enjoy, every day. That’s why for over 50 years, Cif has developed cleaning products that solve the problems you face while caring for surfaces at the same time, giving you the beautiful results you want; whatever the surface or the room, whether it’s a quick spruce-up, or a full deep clean. Looking for another fragrance? Why not try our Cif Lemon Cream Cleaner or Original Cream Cleaner? *Nielsen, Total Market Multipurpose Abrasives, Value/Volume Sales MAT, Nov 2021 **Hard surface cleaner. ***Made with 50% recycled plastic, while we work towards 100% recycled plastic. 1 Ingredients <5 Percent Anionic surfactants, Non ionic Surfactants, Soap, Perfume, Linalool, Hexyl Cinnamal, Benzisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone, Phenoxyethanol, Limonene, Amyl Cinnamal.
